title: Lead Organizer — SIT-SCIHUM'2025 National Symposium
desc: Led and coordinated a national-level technical symposium with 200+ delegates, managing event operations, team coordination, logistics, promotions, and multi-department collaboration across Sairam Institutions.

title: Department Secretary & FUTURA'25 Coordinator
desc: Elected as Department Secretary and successfully organized FUTURA'25, overseeing student coordination, departmental activities, and large-scale academic event execution.

title: Cross-Coordinator Head — Data Sprint 3.0
desc: Served as Cross-Coordinator and Design Team Head for an international hackathon, managing cross-functional event flow, branding, and participant engagement initiatives.

title: Head Coordinator — GRITX 8.0
desc: Led the coordination and execution of GRITX 8.0, an NSS mini hackathon focused on innovation, collaboration, and student-driven problem-solving initiatives.

title: Coordinator — “Think with AI” Workshop
desc: Coordinated an AI-focused workshop conducted in collaboration with AICTE and MoE Innovation Cell, emphasizing prompt engineering and effective AI interaction methodologies.

title: Organizer — Mathematics in AI Bootcamp
desc: Organized a technical bootcamp exploring real-time applications of mathematics in Artificial Intelligence, bridging theoretical concepts with practical AI implementations.

title: Magic Member — Mathophilia 2026
desc: Contributed to organizing an inter-collegiate mathematics symposium featuring technical sessions, competitions, and collaborative academic engagement initiatives.

title: Organizer — DECA AI Hands-on Workshop
desc: Organized an online AI bootcamp covering Full Stack Development, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, APIs, and real-time project implementation.

title: Organizer — Network Defense Strategies Session
desc: Coordinated a cybersecurity guest lecture focused on network defense strategies, simulation-based analysis, and modern security awareness practices.

title: Magic Member — IEEE Smart Village Society
desc: Served as a Magic Member in IEEE Smart Village Society and coordinated a village-standard project proposal funding awareness and engagement initiative.
